tagline: En enkel Bitcoin Lightning-nod med en plånbok, underkonton och NWC-anslutningar.
release_notes:
- v1.22.2 adds a new AI & Agents page, integrated on-chain wallet mode, and custom transaction labels.
- Redesigns settings pages and improves budget selection when creating app connections.
- Adds support for connecting Alby Hub to Core Lightning and includes additional fixes.
